asset_name: Liraglutide Safety, Contraindication and Living Evidence Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_grade: A1/B1 — current label plus primary clinical evidence
controlled_conclusion: Current SAXENDA controls include thyroid C-cell tumour warning, pancreatitis, gallbladder disease, hypoglycaemia in relevant settings, heart-rate increase, acute kidney injury from volume depletion, severe gastrointestinal reactions, hypersensitivity, pregnancy risk and pulmonary aspiration during anaesthesia or deep sedation.

sources.title: SAXENDA current United States prescribing information
A randomised controlled trial of liraglutide 3.0 mg in weight management
Liraglutide and cardiovascular outcomes in type 2 diabetes

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised finished product to catalogue supplier powder
Transfer from trial material to unverified supplier material
Creation of dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
next_review_trigger: Material label, indication, safety, regulatory, trial, manufacturer, quality or supplier-evidence change
